name: Metro / Subway / Train
description: Fast, cheap, and efficient public transport networks. Best for major cities.

name: Taxi / Uber / Grab
description: Private rides offering maximum convenience directly to your destination.

name: Rental Car / Scooter
description: Freedom to explore on your own schedule. Recommended for coastal or rural spots.

name: Walking
description: 100% free, active, and perfect for exploring compact historic centers.
